title: Proposed Approach to the Regulation of Cannabis – Closed consultation  - Canada.ca
content:
## Proposed Approach to the Regulation of Cannabis – Closed consultation

## Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from November 21, 2017 to January 20,  2018
See the Proposed  Approach to the Regulation of Cannabis: Summary of Comments Received During the  Public Consultation for summaries of the discussions that took place.
We have committed to  legalizing, strictly regulating and restricting access to cannabis. In  April 2017, we introduced Bill C-45, the proposed Cannabis Act.  Should the proposed Cannabis Act be approved  by Parliament, regulations will be needed to support its implementation.
In November  2017, Health Canada published a consultation paper entitled Proposed  Approach to the Regulation of Cannabis .

### Who was  the focus of this consultation
- Provincial, territorial       governments
- Indigenous governments and       representative organizations
- Public health community
- Cannabis industry, present       and future

### Key  questions for discussion
The consultation paper set out a series of regulatory proposals on:
- Licences, permits, and authorizations
- Cannabis tracking system
- Packaging and labelling
- Cannabis for medical purposes
- Health products and cosmetics containing cannabis
This Summary of  Comments Received During the Public Consultation summarizes the feedback received from thousands of Canadians, as well as:
- Indigenous  organizations
- provincial and  territorial governments
- other  stakeholders, including public health experts
- current and  prospective cannabis licensed producers
Should the  proposed Cannabis Act be approved by Parliament, we intend to publish final  regulations as soon as possible following Royal Assent of the Act.
To help licensed  producers, provinces and territories, and others prepare for the coming into  force of the proposed Cannabis Act, the Summary of  Comments Received During the Public Consultation provides details on 2 key elements of the proposed regulations:
- the definitions  of micro-scale licences
- the requirements  for plain packaging and labelling of cannabis products

### What we  are hearing
- Summary of  Comments Received During the Public Consultation

### Related  information
- Proposed Approach to the       Regulation of Cannabis
- Supply       Chain for the Commercial Production and Sale of Cannabis - Proposed       Federal Licences
- Proposed       Requirements for Cultivation, Processing, and Federal Sale Licences
